Name: JERA Global Markets
Description:
JERA Global Markets (JERAGM) is a leading utility-backed energy trader specialising in LNG, power, coal and freight. A joint venture between majority shareholder JERA Co., Inc. and EDF Trading, JERAGM’s shareholders are among the world’s major utilities. 

JERAGM operates one of the most exciting energy portfolios in the world which gives it an in-depth understanding of the way local, regional and international energy markets behave. These insights enable it to help its customers increase security of supply, optimise their portfolios and improve the risk management of their assets.

Headquartered in Singapore, JERAGM has a global talent pool of about 400 people across offices located in five strategic locations: Singapore, the UK (London), Japan (Tokyo), the US (Houston) and Australia (Brisbane). 

JERAGM is strongly capitalised with over US$500 million in paid up capital and a total equity of US$4 billion. JERAGM has been affirmed an AA- Stable credit rating from R&I (upgraded from A+ Stable in October 2024), attributable to a robust business model and solid financial base.

Name: Henatenn Holdings
Description:
Powered by the vision of connecting businesses worldwide to transact with ease, Henatenn is an Integrated Omni-channel Commerce and Supply Chain Solutions Enabler that Harnesses Evolving Technological Innovations. 
 
The group comprises three distinct affiliates that offer a comprehensive range of solutions for the beauty and fragrances industry to include:
 
NEFERTI – Channel Distribution Partner
NOVELA – Premium Retailer
DTB – Market Expansion Solutioning 

Customer-centricity and Warmth are deeply ingrained in the Henatenn DNA.  Relationships with partners and customers are highly valued, with many lasting over a decade – one of the key reasons why the company has enjoyed sustainable growth through the years.
 
Internally, it translates to being an equal opportunity and nurturing organisation. Henatenn invests in its employees, giving them room to be creative, grow and excel, which has resulted in a high-performance team that stands united and collaborative. Everyone is empowered to overcome challenges and celebrating success together has become a part of its culture.
 
Henatenn has in less than ten years, grown from 2 people to over 150 employees. In 2019, the company acquired its building to increase efficiencies in both B2B and B2C E-commerce.
 
With an established unique supply chain and distribution system that solidified over the years through continual innovation and customer interaction, the group has seen revenues exceed SGD 100 million annually. 

In the last decade, the group has successfully planted its footprint outside its Singapore headquarters, Henatenn is on-track to achieving its dream of global omni-presence.

Name: EXIM & MFR ENTERPRISE
Description:
Exim & Mfr Enterprise established in 1982 in Singapore, has been a leading provider of high-quality electro-mechanical components, fasteners, sleevings/tubings, wires, and wiring management solutions to industries and manufacturers worldwide.

Our customers include multinational industry household names who rely on us for our commitment to quality, adherence to stringent supplier qualification standards and achieving sustainability initiatives.

     •  Headquartered in Singapore, supported by sales and branch offices in
        India, Indonesia, Malaysia, Philippines, Thailand, and Vietnam.
     •  An extensive product portfolio comprising over 40,000-line items across
        155 commodity groups sourced from reputable manufacturers 
        worldwide.
     •  Our Singapore facility is equipped with state-of-the-art quality control
        equipment, ensuring that every product meets our customer’s exacting
        requirements.
     •  Value-added services like nylon patching, tube cutting and markings, and
        customized kitting and sub-assemblies are available to meet specific
        customer requirements.
     •  We offer integrated supply chain solutions including Vendor Managed
        Inventory (VMI), to streamline operations, enhance efficiency, and cost
        productivity.
     •  DNV and TÜV Registered certifications: AS 9120, IATF 16949, ISO 9001,
        ISO 13485, ISO 14001, ISO 22301, ISO 26000, ISO 27001, ISO 28000, 
        ISO 29001, ISO 37001, ISO 45001, and ISO 50001.

For inquiries or further information, please reach out to us at sales@eximfr.com.sg.

Name: Tionale Pte Ltd
Description:
We are a leading global Wholesale Distribution business established in 1982 and headquartered in Singapore. Tionale, derived from the word “Interna-Tionale” started with one clear vision – build a truly international company. With physical presence in our major markets and automated warehouses in strategic locations, we manage a diversified product portfolio to serve our customers in over 80 countries. Our customers include wholesalers, retail chains, internet retailers, manufacturers and distributors depending on the product category.

 
We provide value to our customers by giving them access to our diversified product portfolio sourced from the most reliable and competitive suppliers globally. Our specialized teams work with our customers and provide technical / commercial inputs, industry trends etc. to aid their decision making. We speak their language – amongst others French in Francophone Africa, Spanish in South America or Mandarin in China which gives us the ability to go deeper in the markets. Our global customer base is spread over developed markets in America, Asia, Europe & Middle East to remote markets in Africa. Our dedicated team takes pride in being close to the customer, unlocking growth opportunities for the business.


We believe in long term partnerships and commitments with our suppliers. Over the years, we have been their partners in their journey to gain insights into the various markets and distribute their products in niche markets. Many of these suppliers have grown with us over the last decade and more, as we provide them the volumes and access to multiple markets while taking over the risks. We carry a wide range of stocks in some of our product categories and deliver in assortments to our customers.

Driven by a vision to deliver customer-centric value in an ever-evolving industrial landscape, HoST is recognised for forging strong, enduring partnerships while consistently expanding its ecosystem to offer best-in-class, future-ready solutions

As a trusted leader in the industry, HoST continues to set new standards, empowering businesses to stay ahead in a competitive and connected world. Learn more at www.host.sg

HoST is part of the Sonepar Group

Name: Neferti
Description:
NEFERTI was inspired by the ancient Egyptian Queen Nefertiti, whose beauty was legendary and with the archaeological discovery of her head bust, remains the world’s most recognisable icon of beauty.  

An affiliate of Henatenn Holdings, NEFERTI was established in 2010 and provided omni-channel supply chain management solutions for beauty and lifestyle products. Supported by over 70 diverse talents in the Singapore headquarters, it manages a comprehensive portfolio across multiple categories: skincare, personal care, fragrances, cosmetics, household and beverages.

NEFERTI offers its experience in distribution logistics and product management, an established and robust global network, and local capabilities to navigate seamlessly in the respective countries. In tandem with its business volume, its reputation amongst industry players has also grown exponentially, making it one of the preferred partners of many brands. Presently, NEFERTI connects with customers spanning China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Japan, Dubai (UAE), Thailand, Australia, USA, Indonesia, Cambodia, Vietnam, Myanmar and Malaysia.

Its transformation to be a leading omni-channel supply chain solution provider has resulted in multiple e-commerce platforms selecting NEFERTI to power its beauty product and fragrance offering as the backend enabler, from sourcing, inventory management, forecasting, delivery as well as marketing. 

Its move to its warehousing facilities has enabled NEFERTI to incorporate digital tools to manage and control information, finance and flow of goods. It has allowed innovative solutions for its customers, as it continues to offer value and competitive ness to meet the needs of the markets and the network.

Name: DTB Distribution
Description:
Having identified the need for even more niche and luxury beauty brands trying to gain a foothold in Asia, DTB, the brand acquisition and distribution affiliate of Henatenn Holdings was established in 2017.  
 
DTB aims to build brands that inspire, and from its creation, unleashed its wealth of knowledge of the industry to secure exclusive rights for highly sought-after premium brands like Filorga, Bioeffect, Marvis and more. 

DTB introduces brands to the market and establishes distribution networks through a whole suite of services that include in-house branding, digital marketing, distribution and visual merchandising, trade/retailer engagement and training. More importantly, its trusted supply chain ensures the authenticity of products that are delivered to the customers.
 
DTB’s quick success led to FMCG labels being added in 2020, as these brands were looking to capture the Asian markets, widely acknowledged to be the fastest-growing globally.  

DTB have acquired 14 brand-exclusive distributorships in Singapore including BIOEFFECT, MAVIS, EMBRYOLISSE and ISDIN. With consumer needs rapidly evolving and becoming more demanding, DTB will continue to grow its niche brands and cult classics to be made available to Asian consumers.

Description:
LP Foods is a Singapore owned company based in Vietnam with extensive experience in aquaculture and sustainably farmed products. We supply our clients with superior frozen seafood, ready meals and value added products.

Name: Corlison
Description:
Established in 1965, Corlison is the largest fully Singapore owned FMCG distributor in our country.

We distribute internationally renowned personal/health/skin care and home cleaning brands locally. We also fully own and market the Pearlie White oral care brand (the first Singapore oral care brand and the only oral care brand that manufactures in our country) internationally.

With the unique position of being both a brand owner and a distributor; we know exactly what you want as a brand owner; for a distributor to accomplish for your brand. 

What do brand owners want? 
They want to work with a distribution partner that invests significantly in the distribution and marketing of their brand today, so that both brand owner and distributor can enjoy the much larger fruits of their labor tomorrow. I.e. In a long term distribution partnership, your distributor must invest aggressively now to help you gain market share. And both can take profits years later when your brand becomes the market share leader. 
We want a distributor that can sell on traditional retail and ecommerce channels and market on both traditional and digital mediums. 
We want a distributor that can handle everything from importation to registration to key account management to deliveries to customer service etc. 

And most importantly, we want a distributor who knows how to accomplish the hardest task of all. To get the consumer that are using that other brand, to switch to yours. 

We help you accomplish this with our full-service distribution model and our full complement of team members/capabilities. And we invest along with our brand principals for the long term success of their brands in our marketplace.

Name: NoaTech Engineering
Description:

Name: Dixon Singapore
Description:
Dixon Singapore is a premier manufacturer and supplier of material transfer products, across a wide range of markets – mining, oil & gas, industry, marine, fire protection, food & beverage, irrigation and petrochemical.

Dixon is committed to being the easiest company to do business with and has an unsurpassed reputation of producing safe and leak free products for more than 100 years.  Founded by Howard W Goodall in 1916 through visiting construction sites, Howard identified their hose and coupling requirements and started manufacturing purpose-built product solutions.  Headquartered in Chestertown, Maryland in the United States of America, Dixon has grown to be a leading innovator in the hose coupling industry.

With sales and distribution centres in  Singapore, China & Australia, Dixon utilises its application based knowledge and current technologies to create products to solve challenges across a wide range of material transfer applications. 

Dixon Singapore is focused on providing value add services, superior customer service, technical support and training; ensuring its customers can connect with the right parts just at the right time.

Excel Hardware prides itself by focusing on the customer’s journey throughout purchases. From general enquiries to after-sales services, Excel Hardware has a dedicated team ready to provide personalised support and assistance for all customers. In addition, all Excel Hardware products have complimentary life-time warranty for Excel Preferred Partners (EPP) and undergo rigorous safety & durability tests before being sold, ensuring that all products are held to the highest industry standards.

Finally, Excel Hardware believes that sustainability is the key to long-term success. In support of Singapore’s focus on sustainable development, Excel Hardware has converted to a 90% e-commerce business, reducing the need to print more than half of its traditional materials.

Excel Hardware’s mission is to become the #1 Singapore legacy for safety cabinet hinges, and Excel Hardware’s vision is to be the vital link to connect people, businesses, and communities, inspiring and empowering the highest industry standards for a sustainable future.

Name: Fire Terminator International Pte Ltd
Description:
Fire Terminator International is a Singapore-based manufacturer and provider of innovative fire fighting solutions. We specialize in developing green, non-toxic, and PFAS-free fire suppression products for all classes of fires, including forest fires. With a strong commitment to environmental sustainability and safety, we offer cutting-edge solutions that prioritize both effective fire control and ecological responsibility.
Green Fire Suppression Solutions: We have developed a range of environmentally friendly fire suppression agents that are highly effective in extinguishing fires while minimizing harm to the environment. Our solutions are free from PFAS (Per- and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances) and other toxic chemicals, making them safe for use in a variety of settings.
Customized Firefighting Solutions: We understand that different industries have unique fire risks and requirements. That's why we offer customized firefighting solutions tailored to specific sectors, including refineries, chemical plants, tank farms, and more. Our team of experts works closely with clients to develop and implement effective fire control strategies that mitigate risks and ensure optimal safety.
AI-Aided Firefighting Solutions: Leveraging the power of artificial intelligence (AI), we provide advanced firefighting solutions that incorporate smart technology. Our AI systems analyze real-time data from various sensors and devices, allowing for early fire detection and proactive response. By harnessing IoT technology, we create integrated systems that enhance the effectiveness and efficiency of fire control measures.
At Fire Terminator International, our mission is to provide state-of-the-art fire fighting solutions that prioritize environmental sustainability, human safety, and efficient fire control. We are dedicated to developing innovative products and leveraging cutting-edge technologies to address fire risks effectively while minimizing ecological impact.

Name: Orca - At the top of your food chain
Description:
Since 2009, Orca Marketing has been Singapore’s premier partner for premium meat and seafood solutions. Born from deep roots in the seafood trade and nurtured through a passion for uncompromising quality, we serve as the reliable supply chain link between the world’s best protein producers and Singapore’s top kitchens.

We specialise in sourcing, processing, and delivering chilled, live, and frozen meat and seafood from trusted origins, including Australia, New Zealand, Japan, and beyond. Over time, we have expanded into beef, lamb, pork, and deli products, growing our portfolio to meet the evolving needs of the foodservice sector.

Our portfolio includes some of the world’s most respected producers, from Blackmore and Stone Axe Wagyu to Little Joe, Portoro, Gooralie Free Range Pork, Kinross Station Lamb, Akaroa King Salmon, Fremantle Octopus, Yarra Valley Caviar, and more. These partnerships ensure every cut and catch reflects the highest standards of quality, sustainability, and provenance.

Through our integrated butchery facility in Senoko, we provide custom processing, SFA-licensing compliance, and same-day delivery across Singapore, ensuring precision, consistency, and speed for our clients.

Our retail arm, Butcher Box, brings these premium proteins directly to consumers while supporting F&B customers through wholesale solutions, all backed by Orca’s robust supply chain, storage, and distribution infrastructure.

If you’re a chef, purchasing manager, or hotel GM seeking a dependable partner with supply certainty, premium sourcing, and personalised service, connect with us. Let’s build a relationship that gives your kitchen access to the finest ingredients, delivered with the consistency and care your menu deserves.

Name: LHS ELECTRONICS ENTERPRISE
Description:
LHS is a regional provider of industrial connectivity, automation, and digital infrastructure solutions, supporting manufacturers, buildings, utilities, and mission-critical facilities across Southeast Asia.

Founded in 1997, we have grown from a trusted distributor into a multi-country solutions integrator delivering end-to-end capabilities across networking, control, Industry 4.0, and sustainability technologies. Our ecosystem brings together leading global partners and in-house technical expertise to help organisations modernise operations, enhance reliability, and accelerate digital transformation.

Our capabilities span:
• Industrial Connectivity & Networking
Rugged switches, networking infrastructure, fiber systems, wireless connectivity, GPON/XPON, IEC 61850 architectures, and secure OT networks for factories, plants, utilities, and transportation.

• Automation & Control Systems
PLC, I/O, machine connectivity, edge integration, protocol bridging, and field-to-cloud interoperability for Industry 4.0 readiness.

• Smart Infrastructure & Building Systems
Unified BMS, automation controls, access systems, structured cabling, audiovisual connectivity, and digital infrastructure for intelligent buildings and campuses.

• Digital & AI Solutions
AI-driven energy optimisation, digital twins, carbon management platforms, indoor navigation intelligence, and data-driven facility performance technologies.

With offices in Singapore and Malaysia and planned expansion across Southeast Asia, LHS combines strong local support with regional execution capability. Our team works closely with system integrators, consultants, contractors, and technology partners to design, implement, and support reliable, scalable solutions.

Our mission is to deliver the connectivity, control, and intelligence that power the industries and infrastructure of tomorrow.

Name: VIT8 PTE. LTD
Description:
Vit8 is a wholesaler and importer of frozen tropical fruit pulps and has been incorporated in Singapore since 2011.
Fruits are processed into frozen fruit pulp shortly after harvest so as to maintain the freshness and quality of the ripe fruit.
Vit8 implements the highest standard of quality control to ensure the top quality of final products. Quality control methods at the Vit8 frozen pulp factory includes:
Powered freezing tunnels to better preserve nutritional and the sensory qualities of the pulp
Equipment to heat pulp and reduce its air content in order to minimize the enzymatic degradation of the pulp.
Top-quality automatic processing and pasteurization unit, designed and built in Italy.
Opportunity to process in the factory some of the fruit varieties cultivated in the adjacent fruit plantation.
It is made of 100% handpicked Brazilian fresh fruits which are processed at the optimal stage of ripeness according to an accurate production process which involves weighing the ripened fruits individually.
No sugar, preservatives or colouring are added to maintain the exceptional nutritional qualities of Brazilian fresh fruits.
Vit8 is collaborating with several cafes to provide Açai, Açerola and Graviola (Soursop) for a new range of smoothies available.
Vit8 frozen tropical fruit pulps are ideal to prepare excellent juices, smoothies, sorbets and yoghurts.
Full range of products by Vit8 includes:
Açai
Açerola
Cajá
Caju (Cashew)
Goiaba (Guava)
Graviola (Soursop)
Mango

Name: Tai Wah Distributors Pte Ltd
Description:
Tai Wah started as a partnership in 1956 with offices in Singapore, Malaysia and Hongkong. Major brands marketed and distributed previously by Tai Wah includes Wella, Ella Bache, Sothys, Nemectron, Takara and 4711.

In 1985, Tai Wah entered into joint ventures with Wella AG in a manufacturing plant in Malaysia and distribution companies in Singapore, Malaysia and Hongkong. Tai Wah has since divested all its interests in these joint ventures.

Over the years, Tai Wah has developed an extensive professional (hair and beauty salon) distribution network in South East Asia and China. It currently markets and distributes these brands – Kadus, Depileve/Anesi, Payot, Wahl.

Tai Wah entered the Chinese market in the late 1990s and today has interests in manufacturing facilities in China – manufacturing hair equipment like hairdryers, hair irons, and machines for hair and beauty salons. It has developed its own range of hair and beauty equipment, machine and accessories under the Tuft trademark. At the same time it also markets and sell the OEM services of these factories in China.

Tai Wah today has taken a more global view of its business interests and currently services a wide customer base from all over the world in the sale of the products from its manufacturing facilities in China. In addition it is promoting and marketing its own brand of hair and beauty equipment and machines under the Tuft label.

Tai Wah also provides sourcing services to foreign companies interested in selling product to or buying products from China. Foreign companies requiring such services will find Tai Wah’s ability to render effective and reliable communication services and its reputation for honesty and ethical practices together with its fully operational office/showroom in China attractive and suitable to the needs.

Premier's Tea is a handful of Tea Brands that are given the rights to use the Geographical Indicator (GI) marks of Darjeeling, Assam, Nilgri & Kangra, a privilege accorded by the Tea Board of India to only those who pack 100% of the original teas from the specific regions.

Name: Faust Innovations Pte. Ltd.
Description:
Faust Innovations Pte. Ltd. is a Singapore based distribution channel focused on Asia and the Middle East.  Our company was founded by entrepreneurs and business leaders who have had environmental and healthy living concerns at the forefront of their thinking for the past 20 years.

Antimicrobial Technology:
Our business is the distribution of innovative products that can change the landscape of society. Products that offer a solution to the societal challenges that we face without causing harm to the world that future generations will inherit.  Products that ensure healthy living both now and in the future.
The products we distribute contain a patented Antimicrobial Plastic Additive (known as d2p AM) that protects against harmful microbes that thrive on the surface of plastic products and other human contact surfaces.
This Antimicrobial Plastic Additive has been tested and proven to create virus reduction of 99.9% in one hour, and are resistant to various forms of algae, bacteria, fungi (mildew, yeasts and moulds).
The potential uses of d2p includes:  medical face masks, gloves (both household and hospital use—nitrile, latex), plastic food containers, plastic food wrap, hospital gowns, shoe boots, hair caps, etc.

OXO Biodegradable Technology:
Certain of the products that we distribute are treated with the additive d2w, which is an oxo biodegradable additive included in the masterbatch production process of plastics manufacturing.  This masterbatch turns ordinary plastic, at the end of its useful life, into a material that readily degrades in the presence of oxygen and sunlight (UV light).
This material degrades in a continuous process that leaves no harmful residue, only carbon dioxide, water and biomass.The potential uses of d2p includes:  medical face masks, gloves (both household and hospital use), plastic food containers, plastic food wrap, hospital gowns, shoe boots, hair caps, etc. Our d2w treated products include face masks, gloves, food packaging products.

Name: Clebae Products (S) Pte Ltd
Description:
Clebae Products (S) Pte Ltd is a wholesale company specializing in a wide range of high-quality products. With our state-of-the-art factory located in China, we manufacture a diverse array of goods, including medical and laboratory equipment and accessories.

At Clebae Products, we pride ourselves on our stringent quality control measures, cutting-edge production techniques, and adherence to industry standards. Our dedicated team of professionals works tirelessly to deliver innovative and reliable products ensures that our customers receive top-notch products that meet their needs and exceed their expectations. Which is also why our factory is ISO 9001, ISO 13485 and FDA cerified.

With a focus on customer satisfaction and long-term partnerships, we strive to provide exceptional value and service to our clients. Whether you are a retailer, distributor, or business looking to source premium products, Clebae Products (S) Pte Ltd is your trusted partner for all your wholesale needs as we are able to create and produce products that are not seen in the market.

Aside from product distribution, Clebae Products (S) Pte Ltd also offers tailored product manufacturing solutions for customers seeking customized projects. Our expertise in manufacturing and supply chain management allows us to act as the intermediary between customers and our factory from design and engineering support till the delivery of the final product.

Name: Dermedex Pte Ltd
Description:
Over a decade of skincare
Dermedex began in 1996, with the mission to bring the best beauty products from all over the world to our customers. The story started with our founder, Peggy Eng, whom has been a professionally trained and certified skincare therapy veteran for over two decades.

Peggy's passion for skincare transcends beyond her role of a therapist to that of a entrepreneur, spotting a lack in a skincare range that can truly provide quick and effective results to solve problematic skin issues. Thus the birth of Dermedex.

Dermedex now serves over 1,000 beauty salons worldwide, and has impacted over 1 million customers.

East meets West
Her pursuit for beauty perfection has led her to continuously search for the highest quality beauty products from all over the world to form the most ideal skin care line – one that combines the best technologies from the East and West, so as to effectively solve all sorts of skincare problems.

Made by professionals for professionals
Peggy believes in beauty products made by professional for professionals, and making them available for everyday women. She emphasizes on the importance of professional advice and education that certified beauty salon can bring to the end consumer. This, coupled with the effective use of Dermedex products has dramatically helped eradicate many clients' skincare problems, enabling them to achieve the beautify skin that they deserve.
